name: SanoTTS
description: On-device neural text-to-speech: a portable C99 int8 iSTFT engine (~745k params, ~680 KB weights) wrapped for Arduino/PlatformIO. Feed it Piper phoneme ids (from a host G2P tool); it synthesizes 22.05 kHz PCM on-chip. Also ships an int8-decoder path for bigger Piper-class voices and the sibilant fricative-noise fix, off by default.
